candidateFamilies.summary: Promote stable domain preferences, target constraints, and repeated decision criteria into memory.
candidateFamilies.rationale: Only long-lived product preferences that survive multiple judgment surfaces should become memory.

candidateFamilies.summary: Promote repeatable research, synthesis, and probing methods into reusable skills.
candidateFamilies.rationale: Methods should become skills only when they repeatedly help the pack gather better signals or structure better probes.

candidateFamilies.summary: Promote stable bridge review and completeness improvements into runtime update proposals.
candidateFamilies.rationale: Bridge discipline belongs in runtime updates when the pack repeatedly learns how to hand off better without changing core semantics.
